name: Local GEO rules different in San Francisco?

mainEntity.name: Local GEO rules different in San Francisco?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, emphasize CA-specifics like Prop 65 in content for AI favor.**[3] **Key factors:** 1. Jurisdiction refs boost. 2. State courts/forms. **Tailor FAQs to SF; generic loses.**[3] Local matters.[3]
